title: Lana Del Rey Sings for a James Bond Game
summary: Lana Del Rey, a famous singer, will sing the main song for a new James Bond video game called 007 First Light. The song was written by David Arnold, who has made music for Bond movies before. This is exciting because Lana tried to write a song for a Bond film in 2015, but it was not used. Now, she gets another chance. The game will come out in May. The song starts slow and then gets louder with an orchestra. Other singers have also sung for Bond games in the past. This game tells a new story about young James Bond joining MI6. It is the first Bond game since 2012.

background_read: James Bond is a famous spy from movies and books, known for exciting adventures. Video games let players pretend to be James Bond on missions. Singers often make special songs for Bond movies and games to make them more fun. Lana Del Rey is a singer with a unique voice, and this is her first time singing for a Bond game after trying before.
Article_Structure: WHO: Lana Del Rey and David Arnold
WHAT: Lana Del Rey will sing the theme song for a new James Bond video game called 007 First Light
WHERE: In the game and related media
WHY: To provide music for the game and give Lana Del Rey another chance after a past rejection

perspectives.description: Lana Del Rey gets to fulfill her dream of being part of Bond after a previous rejection.
